text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky isn't here for training yet, so I start to
get some other work done when...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid I can't tell you that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I had some urgent business to attend to. So
cut me some slack, Jack! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. You know I'll make up for it!
choice_data_list: Just try not to be late next time.
Just try not to be late next time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay. I'm sorry for making you worry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure there must be a reason, and I don't want
to be too strict... I decide not to push the issue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I find out that Maruzensky has been trying
to help the underclassmen with their problems.
